name: Cauldron Energy Limited
analysis: CXU's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 34% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.0890, stop A$0.0564, target A$0.1350 (1.41:1) — then trail it.
